tasks.label: install: editable + test deps
tasks.detail: Install agentteams in editable mode with pytest + pyyaml (CI: pip install -e .[test]).

tasks.label: install: editable (runtime only)
tasks.detail: Install the runtime package only (no test extras).

tasks.label: test: full suite
tasks.detail: Run the full test suite verbosely (README: python -m pytest tests/ -v).

tasks.label: test: quiet
tasks.detail: Run the full test suite with minimal output.

tasks.label: test: current file
tasks.detail: Run pytest against the file currently open in the editor.

tasks.label: test: root doc hygiene
tasks.detail: Enforces filing conventions: no stray plans/reports in the repo root (CLAUDE.md).

tasks.label: verify: environment preflight
tasks.detail: Preflight check of the local development environment (CI: scripts/verify-env.py).

tasks.label: verify: API <-> docs parity
tasks.detail: Read-only check that the API reference covers every module (no drift).

tasks.label: verify: durable -> tmp reference guard
tasks.detail: RSR1 lint guard: fail when tracked source/CHANGELOG cite gitignored tmp/ paths as durable.

tasks.label: agentteams: self update (preview)
tasks.detail: Preview what a self-maintenance update would change, without writing.

tasks.label: agentteams: self update (apply)
tasks.detail: Non-destructive merge-only self update (the core of daily security maintenance).

tasks.label: agentteams: self regenerate meta-team
tasks.detail: Regenerate this module's own meta-agent team (README: Self-maintenance).

tasks.label: agentteams: help
tasks.detail: Show all flags and usage.

tasks.label: agentteams: version
tasks.detail: Confirm the installed version.

tasks.label: agentteams: check drift (brief)
tasks.detail: Exit 0 = no drift, exit 1 = structural/knowledge drift detected.

tasks.label: agentteams: update (merge, brief)
tasks.detail: Re-render drifted files / emit new agents, preserving manual values.

tasks.label: agentteams: scan security (brief)
tasks.detail: Scan deployed agent files for PII, credentials, and unresolved placeholders.

tasks.label: agentteams: fleet update (preview)
tasks.detail: Dry-run preview of a multi-workspace merge update under a parent directory.

tasks.label: agentteams: fleet update (apply)
tasks.detail: Apply the multi-workspace merge update (non-destructive, snapshots each workspace first).

tasks.label: bridge: merge (safe, fenced-only)
tasks.detail: Refresh only fenced (managed) bridge regions. Safe default; never use --bridge-refresh on shared files.

tasks.label: bridge: check freshness
tasks.detail: Validate bridge artifacts against source files (cannot be combined with --bridge-refresh).

tasks.label: docs: serve (live preview)
tasks.detail: Serve the MkDocs site locally with live reload.

tasks.label: docs: build site
tasks.detail: Build the static docs site (CI: .github/workflows/docs.yml).

tasks.label: docs: install toolchain
tasks.detail: Install the pinned MkDocs toolchain used by the docs workflow.

tasks.label: man: regenerate agentteams.1
tasks.detail: Regenerate the man page from the module.

tasks.label: man: verify up-to-date
tasks.detail: Fail if the committed man page drifts from the generated output (CI check).

tasks.label: maintenance: daily security (self only)
tasks.detail: Scoped to agentteams repo root: self update + security scan + regression tests + drift check.

tasks.label: maintenance: daily bridge (self only)
tasks.detail: Scoped to agentteams repo root: bridge merge + freshness checks for maintained pairs.

tasks.label: pipeline: daily digest
tasks.detail: Aggregate the daily-pipeline quality digest.

tasks.label: research: claude-code docs (propose)
tasks.detail: Upstream research stage for Claude Code sub-agents; --propose drafts, --apply commits.

tasks.label: research: ai bad-habits (propose)
tasks.detail: AI bad-habits catalog sync; --propose drafts, --apply commits.

tasks.label: Goose: Bridge Orchestrator
tasks.detail: Launch the Goose bridge orchestrator recipe in its own terminal.
